private_key.description: Mailgun account private API key, sent as the password of HTTP Basic auth (username is the literal 'api'). Never logged.

base_url.description: Mailgun API base URL. Defaults to the US region host; EU-region accounts must override this to https://api.eu.mailgun.net explicitly (see docs.md's Known limits).

domain_name.description: Mailgun sending domain name, substituted into domain-scoped resource paths (required for the events and tags streams).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
